queries.question: What techniques do we have for every photography workshop?
queries.sql: SELECT Techniques.technique_name  from Photography_Workshops_Techniques join Techniques on Photography_Workshops_Techniques.technique_id = Techniques.technique_id join Photography_Workshops on Photography_Workshops_Techniques.photography_workshop_id = Photography_Workshops.workshop_id   GROUP BY Photography_Workshops_Techniques.technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Photography_Workshops_Techniques.photography_workshop_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Photography_Workshops)

queries.question: What techniques do we have for every photography workshop?
queries.sql: select photography_workshops.workshop_id , techniques.technique_name from Photography_Workshops_Techniques join Techniques on Photography_Workshops_Techniques.technique_id = Techniques.technique_id join Photography_Workshops on Photography_Workshops_Techniques.photography_workshop_id = Photography_Workshops.workshop_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?workshop_id ?technique_name WHERE {
  ?photography_workshops_techniques a :Photography_Workshops_Techniques .
  ?techniques a :Techniques .
  ?photography_workshops_techniques p:hasTechniques ?techniques .
  ?photography_workshops a :Photography_Workshops .
  ?photography_workshops_techniques p:hasPhotography_Workshops ?photography_workshops .
  ?photography_workshops p:workshop_id ?workshop_id .
  ?techniques p:technique_name ?technique_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What techniques do we have for every photography workshop?
